title: Review skill UX and CROSS-MODEL REVIEW surfaces
goal: review-code and review-plan expose provider modes; product cadence uses CROSS-MODEL REVIEW with provider field; review-due and gates stop hardcoding Codex-only.

tasks.title: review-code and review-plan modes
tasks.description: Add modes grok, both-codex, both-grok, external-both wiring; Step 0 picker host-aware; both uses host external default; same-family interactive confirm and non-interactive abort/accept-as-local.
scopeBoundary: do not implement external-both findings merge algorithm beyond calling two providers sequentially if already specified; full merge UI can complete in F5
acceptance: skill bodies document modes, host defaults, and same-family non-interactive rules; validate-skills passes; byte budget within limits or updated deliberately

tasks.title: Rename CODEX REVIEW to CROSS-MODEL REVIEW
tasks.description: Update project-drift, project-view, project-verify, last-review schema or writers, index templates to CROSS-MODEL REVIEW with provider field; migration note for old INDEX rows.
scopeBoundary: do not change aiDeck widget layout beyond string labels if any
acceptance: zero user-facing CODEX REVIEW strings in active skill assets; provider field appears in review file template

tasks.title: review-due and provider field persistence
tasks.description: Replace hardcoded --mode=codex in project-create-plan and project-drift review-due with host external default; specify provider enum codex|grok|local plus version; round-trip test for writers/readers.
scopeBoundary: do not change decompose or materialize code
acceptance: assets use host-default language; provider field round-trip test passes; same-family remap never writes provider codex/grok for a same-family run

exitGates.description: validate-skills passes with updated review-code and review-plan modes.
Active skill assets contain zero user-facing CODEX REVIEW product label strings.
Provider field enum and round-trip tests cover review receipts and review-due readers.
